channels.title: Channels
channels.name: Channel name
channels.empty: No channels yet. Create one to get started.

feeds.title: Feeds
feeds.empty: No feeds followed in this channel

compose.title: Compose
compose.commentHint: Your comment will be included when this is syndicated

settings.title: {{channel}} settings
settings.excludeTypesHelp: Select types of posts to hide from this channel
settings.excludeRegexHelp: Regular expression to filter out matching content
settings.retentionHelp: Control how many items this channel keeps in MongoDB. Useful for high-volume aggregator channels that would otherwise grow without bound. Leave any field blank to use the global default.
settings.maxItemsHelp: Keep at most this many items total. Oldest items are deleted regardless of read state. Default: {{default}}.
settings.maxItemsPerFeedHelp: Keep at most this many items per feed inside this channel. Prevents one prolific feed from monopolising the channel cap. Default: {{default}}.
settings.maxUnreadAgeDaysHelp: Unread items older than this are deleted, even if the channel is below its item cap. Default: {{default}}.
settings.deleteWarning: Deleting this channel will permanently remove all feeds and items. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this channel and all its content?
